name: Raymond James Financial Inc. Depositary Shares each representing a 1/40th interest in a share of 6.375% Fixed-to-Floating Rate Series B Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock
summary: Raymond James Financial Inc. Depositary Shares each representing a 1/40th interest in a share of 6.375% Fixed-to-Floating Rate Series B Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock represents a class of preferred equity offered by Raymond James Financial. These shares provide investors with a fixed dividend rate that may convert to a floating rate, and holders have a higher claim on assets than common stockholders in the event of liquidation. The specific terms and conditions of the preferred stock are outlined in the company's filings.
